name: woodbury-ext-nanobanana
description: Generate and edit images using Google's Gemini AI (Nano Banana)

woodbury.name: nanobanana
woodbury.description: Generate and edit images using Google's Gemini image models (Nano Banana). Supports text-to-image generation and image editing with natural language.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key. Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey

IMAGE_OUTPUT_DIR.description: Folder to save generated images. Absolute path or relative to working directory. Defaults to working directory.
